sentences.sentence: As investors tire of stock market instability, the idea of owning a piece of real estate is gaining in popularity.
sentences.translation: 随着投资者厌倦股票市场的动荡，拥有一处房地产的想法正日益受到欢迎。

structure.text: As investors tire of stock market instability
the idea of owning a piece of real estate
is gaining in popularity

difficult_points: As 表示两种趋势同步发展，可译为“随着”。
of owning... 是介词短语，具体说明 the idea 的内容。

sentences.sentence: Now, not everyone has what it takes to become a landlord, but if you can make a go of it, it certainly has the potential to become a good money-earner.
sentences.translation: 当然，并非人人都具备成为房东所需的条件，但如果你能把这件事经营成功，它确实可能成为不错的赚钱渠道。

structure.text: not everyone has what it takes to become a landlord
but if you can make a go of it
it certainly has the potential to become a good money-earner

difficult_points: what it takes 是融合关系结构，表示成功做某事所需的条件或能力。
make a go of it 表示把某事经营成功；两个 it 都指当房东这件事。

sentences.sentence: Here are some tips from successful real estate mogul, Janet Anderson, on how to start building up your property portfolio.
sentences.translation: 以下是成功的房地产大亨珍妮特·安德森就如何开始建立房产投资组合给出的一些建议。

structure.text: Here are
some tips from successful real estate mogul, Janet Anderson
on how to start building up your property portfolio

difficult_points: Here are 使用倒装，真正主语是 some tips。
Janet Anderson 是 real estate mogul 的同位语。
how to... 是“疑问词＋不定式”结构，作 on 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: According to Janet, one of the best ways to identify a bargain is to hunt for foreclosures.
sentences.translation: 珍妮特认为，发现便宜房产的最佳方法之一是寻找法拍房。

structure.text: According to Janet
one of the best ways to identify a bargain
is to hunt for foreclosures

difficult_points: to identify a bargain 后置修饰 ways。
to hunt for foreclosures 作表语，说明具体方法；foreclosures 指被收回并出售的抵押房产。

sentences.sentence: Foreclosures are properties banks have repossessed because their owners were unable to meet the mortgage repayments.
sentences.translation: 法拍房是银行因业主无力偿还按揭贷款而收回的房产。

structure.text: Foreclosures
are properties
banks have repossessed
because their owners were unable to meet the mortgage repayments

difficult_points: banks have repossessed 是省略关系代词 that 的定语从句，修饰 properties。
their 指 properties；because 从句说明银行收回房产的原因。

sentences.sentence: Banks want a quick sell on these places, Janet says.
sentences.translation: 珍妮特说，银行希望迅速卖掉这些房产。

structure.text: Banks want a quick sell on these places
Janet says

difficult_points: Janet says 位于引语内容之后，是后置的消息来源。
a quick sell 在此指快速出售；更常见形式为 a quick sale，源文按原样保留。

sentences.sentence: They want to cut their losses and get their money back as quickly as possible.
sentences.translation: 它们希望止损，并尽快收回资金。

structure.text: They
want to cut their losses and get their money back
as quickly as possible

difficult_points: They 指上句的 Banks。
cut 与 get 是 want to 后的并列动词，共用 to。

sentences.sentence: Developing a network - making connections with city clerks and bank employees who know which properties are about to be sold - can be an excellent way to identify such bargains.
sentences.translation: 建立人脉网络——结识了解哪些房产即将出售的市政工作人员和银行职员——可能是发现此类便宜房产的绝佳方法。

structure.text: Developing a network - making connections with city clerks and bank employees who know which properties are about to be sold -
can be an excellent way
to identify such bargains

difficult_points: Developing... 是动名词短语作主语，破折号内对 network 作解释。
who 修饰 city clerks and bank employees；which properties... 是 know 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: And bargains they certainly can prove to be; in a recent firesale auction ('firesale auction' is the phrase that has been coined to describe auction-room events dedicated entirely to the disposal of repossessed assets) a house with a market value nearing $1,000,000, but with a low reserve price designed to encourage bidders and secure a quick sale, went for $450,000; that's a whopping 55% discount.
sentences.translation: 而它们的确可能成为超值交易；在最近一次“火售拍卖”中（该词是为描述专门处置收回资产的拍卖活动而创造的），一栋市值接近100万美元、但底价很低以吸引竞拍者并促成快速成交的房子，最终以45万美元卖出——折扣高达55%。

structure.text: And bargains they certainly can prove to be
a house with a market value nearing $1,000,000, but with a low reserve price designed to encourage bidders and secure a quick sale, went for $450,000
'firesale auction' is the phrase that has been coined to describe auction-room events dedicated entirely to the disposal of repossessed assets
that's a whopping 55% discount

difficult_points: bargains 被前置以强调，正常语序为 they can prove to be bargains。
括号内 that 修饰 phrase，dedicated... 修饰 events。
designed to... 修饰 reserve price；went for 表示最终成交价。

sentences.sentence: It's also important to be realistic though and not stretch yourself too far financially.
sentences.translation: 不过，保持现实、不让自己的财务负担过重也很重要。

structure.text: It
It's also important
to be realistic though and not stretch yourself too far financially

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正主语是后面的不定式。
be realistic 与 not stretch... 是两个并列的不定式动作；though 表示转折。

expressions.meaning_zh: 让自己的财务负担过重

sentences.sentence: Janet says the biggest mistake you can make is to borrow too much or over-borrow.
sentences.translation: 珍妮特说，你可能犯的最大错误就是借款过多。

structure.text: Janet says
the biggest mistake you can make is to borrow too much or over-borrow

difficult_points: says 后省略 that。
you can make 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 mistake。
to borrow too much 与 over-borrow 同义并列。

expressions.text: the biggest mistake you can make

sentences.sentence: For first-time investors, lenders usually demand bigger down payments because you haven't got a proven track record.
sentences.translation: 对于首次投资者，贷款机构通常要求更高的首付，因为你尚无经过验证的过往记录。

structure.text: For first-time investors
lenders usually demand bigger down payments
because you haven't got a proven track record

difficult_points: For... 指明该贷款要求适用的人群。
because 从句解释首付要求更高的原因。

sentences.sentence: That's more of your money on the table and, therefore, should anything go wrong,you're in for a big financial hit.
sentences.translation: 这意味着你投入了更多自有资金，因此一旦出现问题，你将遭受严重的经济损失。

structure.text: That's more of your money on the table
therefore
should anything go wrong
you're in for a big financial hit

difficult_points: should anything go wrong 是省略 if 的倒装条件句，相当于 if anything should go wrong。
be in for 表示很可能遭遇某事。
wrong,you're 之间缺空格是源文排版异常，按原文保留。

expressions.text: be in for a financial hit

sentences.sentence: Her business partner, James Nylles, is in complete agreement on this point.
sentences.translation: 她的商业伙伴詹姆斯·奈尔斯完全赞同这一点。

structure.text: Her business partner, James Nylles
is in complete agreement
on this point

difficult_points: James Nylles 是 Her business partner 的同位语。
this point 指前文不要过度借贷、应控制财务风险的观点。

sentences.sentence: He also highlights the fact that the mortgage payments and deposits are only part of the long-term cost of buying a rental property.
sentences.translation: 他还强调，按揭还款和首付只是购买出租房产长期成本的一部分。

structure.text: He also highlights the fact
that the mortgage payments and deposits are only part of the long-term cost of buying a rental property

difficult_points: that 从句是 the fact 的同位语，说明事实的具体内容。
of buying a rental property 修饰 long-term cost。

sentences.sentence: There is also the cost of repairs, administration and maintenance, rentalmanager's fees, insurance and so on, all of which require you to hold a significant amount of money in reserve.
sentences.translation: 此外还有维修、管理和保养成本、租赁经理费用、保险费等，所有这些都要求你预留一大笔资金。

structure.text: There is also the cost of repairs, administration and maintenance, rentalmanager's fees, insurance and so on
all of which require you to hold a significant amount of money in reserve

difficult_points: all of which 指前面列举的全部额外费用。
require you to hold 是宾语加不定式补足语。
rentalmanager's 是源文缺少空格的异常形式。

sentences.sentence: Failure to factor this in when calculating how much you can afford to part with in mortgage repayments can lead to disaster.
sentences.translation: 在计算自己能承担多少按揭还款时，如果未把这一点考虑进去，可能会酿成灾难。

structure.text: Failure to factor this in when calculating how much you can afford to part with in mortgage repayments
can lead to disaster

difficult_points: Failure to... 是名词化结构，整个长短语作主语。
when calculating... 是省略主语和 be 的时间状语；how much... 是 calculating 的宾语从句。
part with 在此表示支付或拿出资金。

sentences.sentence: One of the biggest traps for first-time investors, according to Nylles, is the temptation to pay over the odds to get the property you desire.
sentences.translation: 奈尔斯认为，首次投资者最大的陷阱之一，是为了得到心仪房产而抵不住诱惑、支付过高价格。

structure.text: One of the biggest traps for first-time investors
according to Nylles
is the temptation to pay over the odds to get the property you desire

difficult_points: to pay... 修饰 temptation，to get... 又说明高价购买的目的。
you desire 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 property。

sentences.sentence: Buyers often get carried away, especially in the auction-room setting, which can get quite competitive and even descend into a racket of one-upmanship.
sentences.translation: 买家往往会失去理智，尤其是在拍卖场中；那里竞争可能相当激烈，甚至演变成喧闹的相互攀比。

structure.text: Buyers often get carried away
especially in the auction-room setting
which can get quite competitive and even descend into a racket of one-upmanship

difficult_points: get carried away 表示受情绪影响而失去理性。
which 指 auction-room setting；get 与 descend 是并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: They end up paying top-dollar and landing themselves in a financial situation they can ill afford to be in.
sentences.translation: 他们最终会花最高价买下房产，并让自己陷入难以承受的财务处境。

structure.text: They
end up paying top-dollar and landing themselves in a financial situation
they can ill afford to be in

difficult_points: end up 后接两个并列动名词 paying 与 landing。
they can ill afford to be in 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 situation；ill 作副词表示“很难”。

sentences.sentence: Remember, you are in the property game to make money, so the more money you have to pay upfront for a property, the less likely you are to recoup your investment in the long run.
sentences.translation: 记住，你参与房产投资是为了赚钱，所以购买房产时预付的钱越多，长期来看收回投资的可能性就越低。

structure.text: Remember
you are in the property game to make money
so the more money you have to pay upfront for a property, the less likely you are to recoup your investment in the long run

difficult_points: to make money 是目的状语。
the more..., the less... 是相关比较结构，表示一方增加时另一方减少。
you have to pay... 修饰 money。

sentences.sentence: The good news, however, is that the housing market is not very hot at the moment, which means the danger of overpaying is not so great.
sentences.translation: 不过，好消息是目前房地产市场并不十分火热，这意味着出价过高的风险没那么大。

structure.text: The good news
however
is that the housing market is not very hot at the moment
which means the danger of overpaying is not so great

difficult_points: that 从句作表语，说明 good news 的内容。
which 指前面市场不热这一整件事；means 后省略 that。

sentences.sentence: Always set emotions to one side and think from a purely business perspective.
sentences.translation: 务必把情绪放在一边，完全从商业角度思考。

structure.text: Always
set emotions to one side
and think from a purely business perspective

difficult_points: set 与 think 是两个并列的祈使动作。
from a ... perspective 表示采用某种视角来判断。

sentences.sentence: The question of your liking or disliking the property is irrelevant.
sentences.translation: 你喜欢还是不喜欢这套房产并不重要。

structure.text: The question of your liking or disliking the property
is irrelevant

difficult_points: your 是动名词 liking 和 disliking 的逻辑主语。
liking or disliking 构成并列，概括个人感情偏好。

sentences.sentence: As Nylles points out: "you will not be living there."
sentences.translation: 正如奈尔斯指出的：“住在那里的人不会是你。”

structure.text: As Nylles points out
you will not be living there

difficult_points: As 引导评论性从句，表示“正如……所指出的”。
will not be living 使用将来进行时，强调未来居住者并非投资者本人。

sentences.sentence: Business decisions are made in the cold hard light of day; your objective is to minimise your outlay and maximise your return.
sentences.translation: 商业决策应在冷静而现实的审视下作出；你的目标是尽量减少支出、最大限度提高回报。

structure.text: Business decisions are made in the cold hard light of day
your objective is to minimise your outlay and maximise your return

difficult_points: in the cold hard light of day 是比喻，表示抛开情绪后冷静审视现实。
to minimise... and maximise... 是两个并列不定式，作表语说明 objective。

sentences.sentence: Whether you secure a huge home in pristine condition or a tiny flat with barely room to stretch in is irrelevant - if the tiny flat gets you a better return on your investment then the choice is a no-brainer.
sentences.translation: 你买到的是状况完美的大房子，还是小得几乎伸展不开的公寓，都无关紧要——如果小公寓能带来更高的投资回报，选择它自然无需多想。

structure.text: Whether you secure a huge home in pristine condition or a tiny flat with barely room to stretch in
is irrelevant
if the tiny flat gets you a better return on your investment
then the choice is a no-brainer

difficult_points: Whether... or... 引导主语从句，列出两种房产选择。
to stretch in 修饰 room，介词 in 对应在空间中伸展。
no-brainer 指无需思考就能作出的明显选择。

sentences.sentence: And last of all, do your homework.
sentences.translation: 最后，一定要提前做好功课。

structure.text: And last of all
do your homework

difficult_points: last of all 标明这是最后一条建议。
do your homework 在此是比喻，指投资前充分调查，而不是做学校作业。

sentences.sentence: You've got to get to know the location in which you are going to invest.
sentences.translation: 你必须充分了解自己准备投资的地区。

structure.text: You
've got to get to know the location
in which you are going to invest

difficult_points: have got to 表示必须，get to know 表示逐步深入了解。
in which 引导定语从句，修饰 location，介词 in 与 invest 搭配。

sentences.sentence: Look out for areas which are earmarked for government investment.
sentences.translation: 留意那些被指定接受政府投资的地区。

structure.text: Look out for areas
which are earmarked for government investment

difficult_points: which 引导定语从句，修饰 areas。
be earmarked for 表示已被指定用于或预留给某一用途。

sentences.sentence: Urban renewal areas are often very attractive since house and rental prices in such places are low right now but can be expected to rise in the not too distant future.
sentences.translation: 城市更新地区往往很有吸引力，因为这些地方当前房价和租金较低，但预计会在不太遥远的将来上涨。

structure.text: Urban renewal areas are often very attractive
since house and rental prices in such places are low right now but can be expected to rise in the not too distant future

difficult_points: since 引导原因从句。
are low 与 can be expected to rise 是同一主语下由 but 连接的对比谓语。

expressions.text: in the not too distant future

sentences.sentence: The range of local amenities, safety and the state of the local economy are all important factors to consider, too.
sentences.translation: 当地配套设施的丰富程度、安全状况以及本地经济形势，也都是需要考虑的重要因素。

structure.text: The range of local amenities, safety and the state of the local economy
are all important factors
to consider

difficult_points: 三个名词成分并列作主语，所以谓语用 are。
to consider 后置修饰 factors，其逻辑宾语就是 factors。

sentences.sentence: As the old saying goes, 'location, location, location'.
sentences.translation: 正如老话所说：“地段，地段，还是地段。”

structure.text: As the old saying goes
'location, location, location'

difficult_points: As 引导固定评论从句，用于引出俗语。
location 重复三次是修辞强调，突出地段在房产投资中的首要性。

sentences.sentence: Invest in a good location and you will maximise your rental income.
sentences.translation: 投资一个好地段，你就能最大限度提高租金收入。

structure.text: Invest in a good location
and you will maximise your rental income

difficult_points: “祈使句＋and＋陈述句”表示采取前一行动会带来后一结果。
will maximise 表达根据投资地段所作的结果预测。

expressions.meaning_zh: 最大限度提高租金收入
